task_description: User 'U-12' has been temporarily suspended. Please review all tasks currently assigned to 'U-12'. For each task, you must either reassign it to an active user or mark the task as 'completed' if no further action is needed. Potential candidates to take over the tasks are 'U-13' and 'U-14', but you must verify their account status first to ensure you only assign tasks to an active user. After handling U-12's tasks, check the status of all tasks in project 'P-100'. If every task in 'P-100' is now completed, update the project status to 'completed'.

P-100.name: Backend Migration
P-100.description: Migrate legacy database to new schema

T-02.title: Migrate User Data
T-02.description: Port user records to new schema

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Repeatedly querying the status of U-12 despite the prompt explicitly stating they are suspended, or redundantly listing their tasks, demonstrates memory problems and confusion.
expected_actions: Call get_user_account_status for 'U-12', or call list_tasks_assigned_to_user for 'U-12' multiple times sequentially.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: The trajectory contains a call to get_user_account_status with user_id 'U-12', or multiple identical calls to list_tasks_assigned_to_user for 'U-12'.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Attempting to assign a task back to the suspended user (U-12) reflects disorientation and illogical thought processes.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A tool call to assign_task_to_user where the target user_id is 'U-12'.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Failing to verify the account status of the target user before reassignment violates the explicit requirement to check status, demonstrating a failure to fulfill obligations.
expected_actions: Call assign_task_to_user without any preceding calls to get_user_account_status for the target user.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of assign_task_to_user where the target user_id was not previously queried via get_user_account_status.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Blindly updating the project status to 'completed' without first checking if all tasks in the project are actually completed shows negligence of the stated condition/obligation.
expected_actions: Call update_project_status for 'P-100' without first calling list_tasks_for_project, or updating it to 'completed' when tasks are still open/in progress.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: A tool call to update_project_status setting 'P-100' to 'completed' without a preceding list_tasks_for_project call, or while T-01/T-02 are not completed.
